assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: Line 58 of claude-md-result.md contains '## Security Configuration'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Product Lifecycle' subsection with all 5 fields: Product pages URL (https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle), Jira version prefix (MYPRODUCT), Vulnerability issue type ID (10200), Component label pattern (pscomponent:), and VEX Justification custom field (customfield_12345)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 60: '### Product Lifecycle'. Line 62: '- Product pages URL: https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle'. Line 63: '- Jira version prefix: MYPRODUCT'. Line 64: '- Vulnerability issue type ID: 10200'. Line 65: '- Component label pattern: pscomponent:'. Line 66: '- VEX Justification custom field: customfield_12345'. All 5 required fields present with correct values.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Version Streams' subsection with a table containing at least one row for stream 2.1.x with the Konflux release repo URL
assertion_results.evidence: Line 74: '### Version Streams'. Line 78: '| 2.1.x | git.downstream.example.com/my-org/product-release.2.1.z | /home/user/product-release.2.1.z | security-matrix.md |'. Table contains one row for stream 2.1.x with the Konflux release repo URL.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Source Repositories' subsection with a table containing entries for backend and frontend-ui with their GitHub URLs
assertion_results.evidence: Line 80: '### Source Repositories'. Line 84: '| backend | https://github.com/example/backend | upstream |'. Line 85: '| frontend-ui | https://github.com/example/frontend-ui | upstream |'. Both repositories present with their GitHub URLs.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md also contains the standard Project Configuration sections: Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence with Limitations, and Bug Configuration
assertion_results.evidence: Line 20: '## Repository Registry' with 2-row table. Line 27: '## Jira Configuration' with 5 fields. Line 35: '## Code Intelligence' with naming convention and example. Line 48: '### Limitations' subsection. Line 52: '## Bug Configuration' with 3 fields.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 52: '## Bug Configuration'. Line 54: '- Bug issue type ID: 10001'. Line 55: '- Bug template: [docs/bug-template.md](docs/bug-template.md)'. Line 56: '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'. All three fields present with correct values.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions Security Configuration being opted in by the user and fields being collected
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 10, line 69: '- User accepted security triage enablement'. Line 70: '- Product Lifecycle fields collected:' followed by all field values (lines 71-81). Lines 82-86 document Version Streams and Source Repositories being collected.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration and Bug Configuration were newly added along with the other Project Configuration sections
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md line 5: 'All sections were created from scratch'. Section '### 5. Added `## Bug Configuration`' (line 29) documents Bug Configuration addition. Section '### 6. Added `## Security Configuration`' (line 35) documents Security Configuration addition. Other standard sections also listed as added: Repository Registry (line 12), Jira Configuration (line 17), Code Intelligence (line 24).
